subject: Oshawott, a small otter-like creature standing on a rocky shoreline
description: A small blue-and-white otter-like creature stands upright on a rocky coastal surface. The figure has large expressive eyes, a cream-colored oval marking on its chest, and small rounded ears. Behind it the scene opens onto a bright seaside view with blue water, distant green cliffs, and a blue sky with fluffy white clouds. The creature faces the viewer in a cheerful, upright stance with small arms at its sides. The overall palette is dominated by blues and creams, lending a fresh, breezy aquatic feel.
foreground: small otter-like creature standing upright on rocky ground
background: coastal seascape with water, cliffs, and sky
